positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions — structurally optimal vehicle for a Lebanese resident. Portfolio anchor targeting ~36% of holdings NAV. APRIL 24 UPDATE: Position at 38.94% of holdings NAV (1.9989 shares, $1,535.04 market value at $767.94/share, +6.24% unrealized). The multi-report structural underweight remains fully closed. S&P 500 at all-time record levels (7,108+ range); tech reclaiming leadership after brief rotation into energy/value. Remaining deployable cash (~$213.29 unconditional + $100 conditional MA add) to be deployed into CSPX by May 3 hard deadline. If FOMC dovish on April 28-29, U03A -$100 stage-down funded into CSPX as well. $142B AUM, 0.07% TER. Thesis conviction: STRONGER. No structural invalidation conditions triggered.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered during Liberation Day tariff shock. Core thesis: AWS cloud dominance (~33% global cloud market share), advertising revenue at double-digit growth, and AI infrastructure investment (Bedrock, Trainium custom silicon). APRIL 24 UPDATE: Current price $255.08 (+19.23% unrealized from $213.94 cost basis). Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, 2026 at 5:30 PM ET. Consensus: $1.62 EPS, $176.98B revenue. BofA above Street: $178.4B revenue, $21.4B EBIT. AWS growth expected to ACCELERATE to 28-30% from Q4's 24% — Trainium custom silicon now at >$10B annual revenue run rate growing triple-digit YoY. BofA target $298 (raised from $275), KeyBanc $325 (raised from $285). Average analyst target $286.23 (+12.2% upside from current $255.08). 42 Buys / 3 Holds — Strong Buy consensus. FY2026 CapEx nearly quadrupled to ~$200B — key risk to monitor in guidance. RSI elevated — no pre-earnings add warranted. ADD $50-75 post-earnings if: AWS growth >25% AND Q1 EBIT above $20B AND Q2 guidance maintained or raised. Thesis conviction: STRONGER.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP on a sustained basis
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from the retail/advertising business
Sustained margin compression across all segments (retail, advertising, AND cloud simultaneously)
Q1 2026 operating income below the low end of the $16.5B guidance floor with a Q2 guide-down

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so carries zero WHT exposure despite US domicile. APRIL 24 UPDATE — WATCH FLAG ELEVATED, CONVICTION WEAKER: GLD at $431.04 (April 23 close), down from $435.26 (April 22 close) — buffer above $420 trim trigger has narrowed to only 2.6% (from 3.6% on April 22). INSTITUTIONAL HEADWINDS: Morgan Stanley downgraded gold year-end price target from $5,700/oz to $5,200/oz. March gold ETF outflows were the largest since 2013, driven by a stronger dollar and climbing Treasury yields raising opportunity cost of non-yielding gold. GLD is -8.3% over the past 30 days. BULLISH COUNTER-FACTORS STILL INTACT: Iran attacked 3 commercial ships on April 22 despite ceasefire extension — Hormuz remains closed, the 4-week risk-on invalidation clock has NOT started. SSGA maintains 50% base case $4,750-$5,500/oz year-end. Central bank demand ~850 tonnes forecast 2026, PBOC building reserves for 16 consecutive months. Spot gold ~$4,649-$4,830/oz range (down from ATH $5,595.42 on January 29, 2026 — consolidating). Goldman Sachs $5,400 year-end target; JPMorgan $5,000-$6,300; Wells Fargo $6,100-$6,300. Thesis conviction: WEAKER (macro pillars intact but price erosion, institutional headwinds, and 2.6% buffer above trim trigger require heightened daily monitoring).
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening cycle driven by structurally higher real rates that persist above inflation
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend (multiple major central banks becoming net sellers)
GLD breaks and holds below $420 on a daily close — triggers 25% trim rebalance (~$108) into CSPX immediately

Iran war fully and durably resolved AND Strait of Hormuz formally reopened AND risk-on environment maintained for 4+ consecutive weeks — assess 25% trim at that point (4-week clock NOT started as of April 23; Iran ship attacks April 22 confirm Hormuz not durably open)
NEW — Morgan Stanley's reduced target ($5,200/oz) combined with continued institutional ETF outflows for 2+ more consecutive months would further weaken conviction toward DETERIORATING

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: 30% WHT on dividend — confirmed $3.33 withheld YTD (MA dividend only). Annualised WHT drag <$4 at current position size. Immaterial.
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network duopoly (MA + Visa) with near-monopoly economics, asset-light model generating high ROE, global consumer spending volume exposure, and pricing power. APRIL 24 UPDATE: Current price $502.38 (-2.12% unrealized from $513.24 cost basis). Pre-earnings consolidation — not a thesis signal. 35 of 38 analysts Buy/Outperform (29 Strong Buy / 4 Moderate Buy / 2 Hold upgraded to outperform); BMO Capital initiated Outperform rating in April 2026. Average price target $654.66 (+30.3% upside from current $502.38). Earnings EPS estimate $4.40/share (+18% YoY from $3.73). Q1 2026 earnings confirmed April 30, 2026. Q1 covers January-March (pre-peak Iran escalation), so cross-border volumes expected clean. Guidance: net revenue growth at low end of low-double-digit range (currency-neutral, ex-inorganic) with FX tailwind of ~3.5-4.0ppt. Key watch metrics for ADD $100 on April 30: cross-border volume must exceed Q4 2025's 14% rate AND VAS growth must sustain above 20% (Q4 exit rate 22%) AND guidance maintained or raised. WHT drag <$4/year at current size — immaterial. Thesis conviction: SAME (pending April 30 earnings data).
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (FedNow, open banking) gaining scale at the expense of card networks
Regulatory caps on interchange fees in core US or European markets
Q1 2026 earnings miss on cross-border volumes or management guides down — re-evaluate immediately on April 30
Sustained global consumer spending contraction lasting multiple quarters

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware; CUDA ecosystem creates deep switching costs. APRIL 24 UPDATE: Current price $199.64 (+9.71% unrealized from $181.98 cost basis). Consolidating from $202.50 after the 18-day, 18% rally — normal RSI correction from extremely overbought levels (RSI 91.26). Vera Rubin confirmed in full production: delivers 10x more performance per watt than Grace Blackwell, H2 2026 shipments on track. EARNINGS DATE NOTE: Sources conflict — some cite May 20, others May 27 for Q1 FY2027 earnings. Prior thesis corrected to May 27, 2026; confirm via NVIDIA investor relations before that date. Q1 FY2027 consensus: $78.8B revenue, $1.75 EPS. Jensen Huang confirmed $1T+ combined Blackwell AND Vera Rubin backlog through end-2027 — doubled from $500B one year ago. Q4 FY2026: $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62 (beat $1.50 estimate by 8%). Average analyst target ~$270 (+35% upside from $199.64). 38+ analysts Strong Buy consensus. Hyperscalers collectively committing $600B+ in 2026 AI capex. Near-term risk: ~500K-unit Vera Rubin GPU shortfall due to HBM supply constraints — near-term headwind, not thesis invalidation. Thesis conviction: STRONGEST IN PORTFOLIO.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) takes meaningful and sustained share in AI training workloads
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers visibly cut or guide down infrastructure spend across multiple quarters
Export restrictions to China expand materially beyond current guidance, reducing total addressable market by >15%
Post-GTC 2026: $1T+ order backlog proves overstated or a significant portion of orders cancelled in subsequent quarters
Vera Rubin production delays extending beyond Q3 2026 — would defer the next re-rating catalyst

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent / capital preservation layer with 0% effective WHT. Replaced SGOV (which carried 30% WHT on distributions) — structurally optimal for Lebanese residents. US Treasury interest paid to an Irish-domiciled fund qualifies for the portfolio interest exemption from NRA withholding. Near-zero duration risk (0-3M). APRIL 24 UPDATE: Position at 15.24% of holdings NAV (5.6247 shares at $106.83, $600.89 market value, -1.17% unrealized). YTM 3.67% as of April 21 (BlackRock/justetf data) — essentially unchanged from 3.68% prior; well above 3.0% trim trigger. NAV Total Return YTD: +1.01% (as of April 13). Fed holding at 3.50-3.75%; FOMC April 28-29 expected to hold (JPM: 'easy call'). JPMorgan forecasts NO Fed cuts in 2026 (possible 25bps hike Q3 2027). Continued Iran-Hormuz closure and ship attacks on April 22 reinforce near-term capital preservation rationale. STAGE-DOWN PLAN ACTIVE: Target reduction from 15.24% toward ~10% of NAV in stages. April 28-29 FOMC is the next trigger: dovish signal (rate cut window mentioned explicitly) = first stage-down of ~$100 redeployed into CSPX immediately. Given JPM's hawkish forecast, this trigger is unlikely to fire at April 28-29 meeting. Do not trim before FOMC clarity. Thesis conviction: SAME.
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively (>100bps in 2026) — opportunity cost vs equities rises significantly, accelerate trim
A better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle with superior risk-adjusted return is identified
Portfolio NAV grows large enough (>$10K) that maintaining a 15% cash equivalent layer imposes unacceptable drag on long-term returns
YTM falls below 3.0% — at that point, reduce toward 8-10% of NAV immediately
